BookingSystem

  • Uses of BookingSystem in Unnamed Package

    Constructors in Unnamed Package with parameters of type BookingSystem
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    AdminFrame(BookingSystem system, Admin admin)
    Creates the Admin dashboard.
     
    LoginFrame(BookingSystem system)
    Creates the login window.
     
    UserFrame(BookingSystem system, User currentUser)
    Creates the User dashboard.
